mapper.sql: select s.session_id, s.agent_id, s.agent_code, s.user_login_name, s.business_system, s.token_usage, s.iteration_count, s.status, s.last_message_time, s.title, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark, a.agent_name from ai_agent_session s left join ai_agent a on s.agent_id = a.id
mapper.select: where s.business_system = #{businessSystem} and s.status = '0' order by s.last_message_time desc
select distinct s.user_login_name from ai_agent_session s where s.business_system = #{businessSystem} and s.user_login_name is not null order by s.user_login_name
mapper.delete:
delete from ai_agent_session where session_id in
#{sessionId}
mapper.select: select distinct business_system from ai_agent_session where business_system is not null order by business_system

select s.business_system as businessSystem, s.user_login_name as userLoginName, count(s.session_id) as sessionCount, max(s.last_message_time) as lastActive from ai_agent_session s where s.business_system is not null and s.user_login_name is not null group by s.business_system, s.user_login_name order by s.business_system, s.user_login_name
select count(*) from ai_agent_session where create_time <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
select count(*) from ai_agent_session where DATE(create_time) <= #{date}
